docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-02-2019 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAI IWASAKI IS PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KAI IWASAKI IS GRANTED.JUDGMENT AT NEW TRIAL IS ISSUED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, PLAINTIFF YOUNG MICHEAL (CORRECTED MICHAEL YOUNG) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAI IWASAKI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $175.00) SERVED OCT-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI
ORDER RE: CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY YOUNG, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2019 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI $7,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00, DEFENDANT KAI IWASAKI SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNG. COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF YOUNG MICHAEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAI IWASAKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IWASAKI, KAI $2,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,420.00, PLAINTIFF PAID DEFENDANT, MASTER TENANT, A SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $2,600. DEFENDANT NOTIFIED PLAINTIFF OF DAMAGES BUT FAILED TO PROVIDE PROOF OF DAMAGES AND FAILED TO RETURN A PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT, MORE THAN THE DAMAGES. COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS WERE NOT IN BAD FAITH. COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. *SEE ATTACHED* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
